items.title: Draft a concise release note
items.content:
Write a concise release note for the new MVP extension scaffold.
Include major changes, risks, and next steps.
Keep the summary under 120 words.

items.title: Review implementation plan
items.content:
Review the MV3 implementation plan for gaps.
List missing acceptance criteria and validation steps.
Return actionable suggestions only.
